description: Reconciliation agreement between husband and wife. Dated: 6 Tammuz 5415 AM, which is 1655 CE. Venue: the residence of Aharon Rofe Ḥazan (presumably in Cairo). After a dispute between them, Shaḥata b. Aharon Feyruz takes an oath not to divorce his wife Ḥanīna bt. Ḥananya for twenty years. Shaḥata also commits to pay Ḥanīna the value of her ketubba within thirty days, in the event that the couple does divorce. MCD.
description_he: הסכם פיוס בין בעל ואשה. תאריך: ו' תמוז 5415 = 1655 לספירה. מקום: בית אהרן רופא חזן (קהיר). שחאטה ב' אהרן פירוז נשבע לא לגרש את אשתו חנינה ב' חנניה למשך עשרים שנה.
